description: Standardized scoring model for assessing the severity of known vulnerabilities using metrics such as attack vector, complexity, privileges, user interaction, scope, and CIA impact.

fields.meaning: Conditions beyond attacker control required for exploitation.
fields.name: attack_complexity

name: CVSS
usage_guidelines: Use CVSS when a threat is grounded in a concrete vulnerability.
Adapt metric interpretation carefully for blockchain execution semantics.
Keep the vector string and rationale in the generated model.
